scripts.build: vp run @mariozechner/mini-lit#build && vp run @mariozechner/pi-tui#build && vp run @mariozechner/pi-ai#build && vp run @mariozechner/pi-agent-core#build && vp run @mariozechner/pi-web-ui#build && vp run sitegeist#build && vp run sitegeist-site#build
scripts.check: vp check && vp run @mariozechner/mini-lit#check && vp run @mariozechner/pi-web-ui#check && vp run sitegeist#check && vp run sitegeist-site#check
scripts.ready: vp run check && vp run build
